disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are globally disabled. If the active touchpoint matches any entry in this list, the offer screen will not be shown (results in CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint names that are globally disabled. If the active sub-touchpoint matches any entry in this list, the offer screen will not be shown (results in CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint configurations defining offer display rules per entry point. Each entry matches one or more touchpoints by name or names list. If no entry matches the requested touchpoint, the entry named 'default' is used as a fallback.

names.description: Additional touchpoint name aliases this configuration applies to. Allows a single touchpoint entry to match multiple touchpoint identifiers beyond the primary name field.

name.description: Primary identifier of the touchpoint. Used to match the incoming touchpoint request. If no touchpoint matches by name or names list, the entry with name 'default' is used as a fallback.

info.description: List of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines display conditions and behavior for one offer variant. The first entry whose launch_logic conditions are satisfied is used.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier of the thank-you popup to display after a successful subscription or purchase action on this offer.

launch_logic.description: List of condition sets that determine when this offer should be displayed. The offer is shown if at least one condition set in this array is fully satisfied. If this array is empty, the offer is always eligible to be shown.

should_replace_with_ad.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced by an interstitial ad when one is available for this touchpoint.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced by a rewarded ad that grants credits when such an ad is available for this touchpoint.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app install required to show the offer (inclusive). -1 means no lower bound.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of editor completions (times the user finished editing) required to show the offer. -1 means no lower bound.

app_session_end.description: Maximum total app session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. -1 means no upper bound.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum number of editor completions (exclusive) allowed when showing the offer. -1 means no upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum number of times this offer has already been shown for this touchpoint+screens combination (inclusive). -1 means no lower bound.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package IDs. The condition passes if the user has previously purchased any of the listed packages. Empty list means this check is skipped.

user_had_subscription.description: If true, the offer is shown only to users who previously had any subscription. If false, only to users who have never had a subscription. If null/omitted, this check is skipped.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced by a rewarded interstitial ad when one is available for this touchpoint.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key session count (tracked by session_key) required to show the offer. -1 means no lower bound.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app install allowed when showing the offer (exclusive). -1 means no upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: If true, the offer is shown only to users in the AI credits flow. If false, only to users not in that flow. If null/omitted, this check is skipped.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen within this specific launch logic rule. Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

repeat_key_session.description: If set, the offer is shown periodically based on key session count intervals (every repeat_key_session+1 key sessions). -1 or empty session_key means this check is skipped.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show the offer. -1 means no lower bound.

is_store_available.description: If true, the offer is shown only when Google Play Store payment is available as an active payment type. If false, only when it is not available.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key session count (exclusive, tracked by session_key) allowed when showing the offer. -1 means no upper bound.

repeat_session.description: If set, the offer is shown only when the total app session count is a multiple of this value. -1 means the offer is eligible every session regardless of count.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Deprecated. Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen within this specific launch logic rule. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint.

restricted_packages.description: List of package and offer ID pairs. The offer is shown only if the user is eligible for a promotional offer for every entry in this list. Empty or null means no restriction.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier used to check whether the user is eligible for a promotional offer.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier used together with package_id to verify the user's eligibility for a promotional offer.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type values the user must currently have to see this offer. Empty list means any tier is accepted. The value 'free' targets non-subscribed users. Other values match the user's active subscription plan tier.

app_session_start.description: Minimum total app session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. -1 means no lower bound.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times this offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint+screens combination. -1 means no daily limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: If true, the offer screen is replaced by a rewarded ad when a rewarded ad is available for this touchpoint.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: If true, this offer is suppressed while a cooldown period (e.g. after purchasing a one-day pass) is active.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum number of times this offer may be shown for this touchpoint+screens combination (exclusive). -1 means no upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum device storage usage percentage (exclusive) allowed when showing the offer. -1 means no upper bound.

offer_variant.description: Identifier for the offer variant or design to display. Used to select among different UI presentations of the offer screen.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Combined with the touchpoint name to form a composite key used for session and daily count tracking.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier used to navigate to or display the offer screen. Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

session_key.description: An independent key used to track how many times this offer has been shown, separate from the touchpoint-based session counter. Used for key_session_start/end range checks and repeat_key_session interval logic. Empty string means no key-based session tracking.

is_one_time_offer.description: If true, this offer is a one-time offer and will only be presented to the user once.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Deprecated. Touchpoint identifier used to navigate to or display the offer screen. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint.
